endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/alerts
endpoints.description: List all the alerts that are associated with the subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/locations/{ascLocation}/alerts
endpoints.description: List all the alerts that are associated with the subscription that are stored in a specific location
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ASCLOCATION}} with a real asclocation.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/locations/{ascLocation}/alerts/{alertName}
endpoints.description: Get an alert that is associated with a subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ASCLOCATION}} with a real asclocation. Replace {{ALERTNAME}} with a real alertname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/locations/{ascLocation}/alerts/{alertName}/dismiss
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ASCLOCATION}} with a real asclocation. Replace {{ALERTNAME}} with a real alertname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/locations/{ascLocation}/alerts/{alertName}/reactivate
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ASCLOCATION}} with a real asclocation. Replace {{ALERTNAME}} with a real alertname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Security/alerts
endpoints.description: List all the alerts that are associated with the resource group
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Security/locations/{ascLocation}/alerts
endpoints.description: List all the alerts that are associated with the resource group that are stored in a specific location
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{ASCLOCATION}} with a real asclocation.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Security/locations/{ascLocation}/alerts/{alertName}
endpoints.description: Get an alert that is associated a resource group or a resource in a resource group
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{ASCLOCATION}} with a real asclocation. Replace {{ALERTNAME}} with a real alertname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Security/locations/{ascLocation}/alerts/{alertName}/dismiss
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{ASCLOCATION}} with a real asclocation. Replace {{ALERTNAME}} with a real alertname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Security/locations/{ascLocation}/alerts/{alertName}/reactivate
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{ASCLOCATION}} with a real asclocation. Replace {{ALERTNAME}} with a real alertname.
